rows.notes: Top-of-page title. Handwriting slightly slanted and the second word is abbreviated; read as 'Soluta Audinaria' based on letter shapes. No monetary figures on this line.

Clear '20 0 0' at right. Name 'W: Thompson' legible; classified as an entry with amount.

Pounds/shillings/pence read as 6/4/6. The word 'Padiers' is faint/abbreviated, could be 'Paders' or similar — amount alignment is clear.

This line contains a description and an amount '0 19 1' at the right. Text 'Soluta Scholari Parvieni' is slightly cramped but legible; treated as an entry because it carries an amount.
Section heading 'Soluta Varia.' appears centered-ish and introduces the following small sundry items. No amount written on this exact short heading line (the next lines are the itemised amounts).

Right columns show '1 3 0' clearly. The short description 'Poor Rates' is unambiguous.
Amount reads '0 15 0' but the left description is somewhat cramped and the personal name 'Milman' is slightly unclear (could be 'Milsom'). Alignment of amount is clear, hence moderate confidence.
